summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. All requested features verified working: Logo without moon, Lettre à Moi-Même flow (write->schedule->send), Cadence page with rituals and streak, Sagesse page with quotes, and all backend APIs (letter, cadence/daily, cadence/streak, cadence/complete, sacred-quote).
critical_code_review_comments: Moon removed from logo in index.tsx - brandingContainer only has 'Latence' text and byline
Theme toggle button in corner uses moon-outline icon (for theme switching, not logo)
Letter API POST /api/letter working correctly with delivery_months
Cadence API endpoints all functional: daily, streak, complete
Sacred-quote API returning beautiful quotes from wisdom traditions
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Lettre via letter API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: App fully functional. Mobile viewport 390x844. All features from user requirements verified: logo sans lune, Lettre à Moi-Même, Cadence, Sagesse, onboarding flow.

Logo sans lune.details: Landing page shows 'Latence' + 'by Atelier Benamer' only - no moon emoji in logo area

Onboarding flow.details: mood selection (12 options) -> energy (1-5) -> wisdom quote -> home page

Lettre à Moi-Même.details: Write page -> date selection (1,3,6,12,60 months) -> send -> confirmation 'Lettre envoyée' with delivery date

POST /api/letter.details: Creates letter with content and delivery_months, returns success and delivery_date

Cadence page.details: Shows streak badge (🔥 4j), time badge (Soir), poetic greeting, moon influence, progress (0/4), micro-rituals

POST /api/cadence/complete.details: Marks ritual as completed with ritual_id and ritual_type

Sagesse page.details: Shows quotes with author (Lao-Tseu, Rumi, etc), save/share buttons, 'Une autre sagesse' refresh button

GET /api/sacred-quote.details: Returns text and author from wisdom traditions

GET /api/sacred-text/{mood}.details: Returns mood-specific sacred texts (serein, joyeux, melancolique, anxieux)

Home page.details: Shows moon phase (Gibbeuse Croissante), capsules count (14), rêves count (3), navigation to Cadence/Sagesse/Lettre

bugs_verified_fixed: Lettre à Moi-Même sending - WORKING (full flow tested: write -> select date -> send -> confirmation)
Logo moon removed - VERIFIED (only theme toggle uses moon icon, not logo)
